/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ai-lab/Downloads/DRL-robot-navigation_segway_imu_should_be_calibrated/DRL-robot-navigation/catkin_ws/build_isolated/velodyne_simulator/gtest/lib ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
